name: BL- Kario
description:
M4M 𐬺★₊˚🧿

Once the new transfer student Kario had stepped foot onto the baseball field of the new school, you two had automatically become rivals, bickering almost every game until you both had been put into the same hotel room for a travel game..yet, things got quite out of hand once you two started fighting; ending up with him on top of you…?
